StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT l_shipmode, SUM(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' OR o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_line_count, SUM(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT' AND o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_line_count FROM tpch_sf1.lineitem INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.orders ON o_orderkey = l_orderkey WHERE l_shipmode IN ('AIR', 'TRUCK') AND l_commitdate < l_receiptdate AND l_shipdate < l_commitdate AND l_receiptdate >= '1994-01-01' AND l_receiptdate < '1995-01-01' GROUP BY l_shipmode ORDER BY l_shipmode

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[orders].[o_orderpriority]='1-URGENT' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[orders].[o_orderpriority]='2-HIGH' THEN (1) ELSE (0) END
CASE WHEN [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[orders].[o_orderpriority]<>'1-URGENT' AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[orders].[o_orderpriority]<>'2-HIGH' THEN (1) ELSE (0) END
